description_long: This is a round, white ceramic plate with a slightly raised rim, filled with a meal consisting of three distinct portions. One section contains a mound of white rice, another features glazed meat pieces garnished with sesame seeds and chopped green onions, and the third section holds a serving of roasted or sautéed orange vegetables, likely carrots. The plate sits on a dark, speckled countertop, and the food is attractively arranged with visible textures and colors. The plate itself has a subtle decorative pattern along the rim, adding a touch of elegance. The overall presentation suggests a freshly prepared, appetizing meal ready to be served.
description: A white ceramic plate with rice, glazed meat topped with sesame seeds and green onions, and orange vegetables, arranged on a dark countertop.
description_view_0: The plate is viewed from an angle highlighting the rice on the left, glazed meat with green onions and sesame seeds in the center, and orange vegetables on the right.
description_view_1: This view centers the glazed meat and green onions, with the rice and orange vegetables flanking either side, showing the food's textures clearly.
description_view_2: The orange vegetables are most prominent in the foreground, with the rice and glazed meat partially visible behind.
description_view_3: The rice dominates the foreground, with the orange vegetables to the left and the glazed meat and green onions mostly in the background.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative pattern visible along the rim of the plate.
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is placed on a dark, speckled countertop.
